additional_information:
15 ADDITIONAL INFORMATION ON REVERSIBILITY

Description: Outer or inner wall of a residential or commercial building
Type of fixing: Steel wall anchors for mechanical fixing
Level of reversibility: Reversible connections with light repairable damage
Simplicity of disassembly: Simple – requires the use of specific though common tools
Speed of disassembly: Speed of disassembly varies from quick to slow depending on element dimensions
Ease of handling (size and weight): Easy to manipulate (by hand (small size and limited weight): one worker should be sufficient
Robustness of material (material resistance to disassembly): The material resists well during disassembly
